scripts.__plop:test: concurrently -s first -k "npm run plop" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && npm run test:e2e"
scripts.__start: npm run build && npm run start --prefix app
scripts.start: concurrently "DEV_PATH=text/src/dev.tsx npm run start --prefix ../_app" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && open-cli 'http://localhost:3000?testName=OdsText'"
scripts.__test:react:e2e: concurrently -s first -k "npm run start --prefix tests/_app" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && jest --detectOpenHandles"
scripts.__test:react:e2e2: concurrently -s first -k "npm run start --prefix ../_app" "wait-on http://localhost:3000 && jest --detectOpenHandles"
